title: CBI ACB Dhanbad – Special Public Prosecutor – 01 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI ACB Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 01 Special Public Prosecutor. Candidates with LLB Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 29-04-2026, and closes on 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CBI ACB Dhanbad website, cbi.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI), Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Govt. of India
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - through the prescribed online link (documents to be uploaded by applicant through the link)

application_fee.general_fee: As per DoPT letter No. 225/19/2023-AVD-II dated 08.04.2024 (details below)

age_limit.age_details: Final appointment/engagement as Special Public Prosecutor for minimum 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: LLB (Bachelor of Laws) from a recognized University

selection_process: Shortlisting + Interaction with CBI Interaction Committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the prescribed online link provided by CBI ACB Dhanbad. Hard copy or offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The complete application in the prescribed proforma along with all requisite documents should be uploaded through the online link. Applications received incomplete, offline, or after the last date of 23/05/2026 will not be considered. Applicants should note that once submitted, candidature cannot be withdrawn.
